summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for CreatorAI. All 9 backend pytest cases pass (auth, onboarding, content generate via GPT-5.4, list/get/delete, schedule, stats). Frontend mobile web preview loads correctly; auth redirect, login, signup->onboarding, dashboard, create->generate (LLM ~15s), content viewer, schedule tab, profile logout all functional. Only minor testID naming discrepancies vs review-request spec — no functional bugs.

ui_bugs.issue: Copy button testIDs are auto-generated from title text. Actual IDs: copy-thumbnail-idea (not copy-thumbnail), copy-hashtags-15- (dynamic, includes hashtag count). Spec expected static copy-thumbnail and copy-hashtags.
No copy-ideas button; instead each idea card is individually pressable with testID idea-0/1/2. Spec listed copy-ideas.
Chip testIDs are lowercased/hyphenated (e.g. onboarding-chip-ai). Spec written as onboarding-chip-<Niche> may suggest original casing.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking, but should be cleaned up for RN Web compatibility.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Align copy-button testIDs with review spec (copy-thumbnail, copy-hashtags, copy-ideas) by passing an explicit testId prop to SectionTitle rather than deriving from title.
OPTIONAL: Replace deprecated shadow* and pointerEvents props to remove RN Web console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id is correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} on all reads — good.
JWT auth + bcrypt password hashing implemented correctly.
LLM path: emergentintegrations LlmChat with gpt-5.4, JSON parsing + fallbacks (hashtag padding, viral_score clamp, default fields) — robust.
server.py at 449 lines — acceptable, under 700-line threshold, could still be split into routers if it grows.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of manually walked flows (auth redirect, login, signup, onboarding, dashboard, create+generate, content viewer, schedule list, profile logout)

seed_data_creation: Demo user demo@creator.ai/password123 exists and was onboarded (niche=AI, goals=[Go viral, Post daily]). ~3 generated content items in demo account, 1 scheduled item.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Frontend flows all pass end-to-end on mobile viewport 390x844. LLM generation takes ~15s. If retesting, use demo@creator.ai/password123. Chip testIDs are lowercased-hyphenated (onboarding-chip-ai). Copy button testIDs are derived from section titles (copy-script, copy-voiceover, copy-thumbnail-idea, copy-caption, copy-hashtags-<n>-). Ideas cards use idea-0/1/2 for copying.
rca_of_issue: No functional bugs found. Minor spec-vs-implementation testID naming mismatches noted for optional cleanup.
